trans-unit.source: Simple tool for filling large closed areas with a specific color. Use the left mouse button to fill, and the right mouse button to erase.
Simple tool for erasing. Use either the left or right mouse button to erase.
Allows you to rotate and move your skin without accidentally drawing on it.
Simple tool for drawing. Use the left mouse button to draw, and the right mouse button to erase.
Copy pixels from base layer to overlay. Only works when overlay is visible. Use the left mouse copy pixels up, and the right mouse button to copy them down.
Makes pixels lighter/darker or adjusts their color based on the palette. Use the left mouse button to darken, and the right mouse button to lighten.
